things.name: Angel Falls (Salto Angel)
things.description: World's highest waterfall at 979m - fly to Canaima and take a boat through the jungle

things.name: Cerro El Avila (Waraira Repano)
things.description: National park looming over the city - cable car to the top with views of both sea and city

things.name: Casa Natal del Libertador
things.description: Birthplace of Simon Bolivar, South America's greatest independence hero

things.name: Museo de Arte Contemporaneo de Caracas
things.description: Venezuela's finest modern art collection with Picasso, Leger and Chagall

things.name: Sabana Grande Pedestrian Boulevard
things.description: Caracas's famous pedestrian street with street musicians and pavement cafes

things.name: Catedral de Caracas
things.description: 18th-century colonial cathedral on the Plaza Bolivar

things.name: Parque del Este (Romulo Betancourt)
things.description: Botanical gardens and lake park designed by Roberto Burle Marx

things.name: Canaima National Park
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage tepui plateau landscape - the world that inspired Arthur Conan Doyle

things.name: Mercado de Chacao
things.description: Upscale Caracas food market with fresh tropical fruits and gourmet Venezuelan produce

things.name: Arepas at La Abuela
things.description: Venezuela's iconic cornmeal bread stuffed with cheese, chicken or black beans
